summary: SOS Silent Mode (Phase 48 - Escape Layer) - All 26 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with big red trigger widget, chain config (notification + call), voice keywords, settings toggles, history section, and SSE integration. All 5 backend endpoints working correctly.

GET /api/sos/config.returns_config: PASS - Returns SOS config with all fields (id, user_id, enabled, voice_keywords, chain_notification, chain_notification_delay, chain_call, chain_call_delay, chain_call_preset_name, chain_notification_title, chain_notification_message, trusted_contacts, auto_share_location, silent_mode, updated_at)
GET /api/sos/config.auto_creates_defaults: PASS - Auto-creates config with defaults on first access

POST /api/sos/trigger.creates_active_sos: PASS - Creates active SOS with sos_id, status=active, trigger_type, lat, lng, triggered_at
POST /api/sos/trigger.returns_chain_info: PASS - Returns chain object with notification (delay_seconds, title, message) and call (delay_seconds, caller_name)

POST /api/sos/cancel/{sos_id}.cancels_active_sos: PASS - Resolves SOS with status=resolved, resolved_by, resolved_at

GET /api/sos/history.entry_structure: PASS - Each entry has id, trigger_type, status, lat, lng, chain_notification_triggered, chain_call_triggered, alert_sent_to, resolved_by, triggered_at, resolved_at

frontend_ui.nav-sos: PASS - Navigation link works, positioned between 'Escape Notification' and 'Route Monitor', uses RED highlighting (bg-red-600) instead of teal
frontend_ui.sos-page: PASS - Main container loads correctly with data-testid
frontend_ui.sos-trigger-widget: PASS - Big red circular button (w-32 h-32 rounded-full bg-red-600) visible and clickable
frontend_ui.sos-trigger-card: PASS - Gradient card with trigger widget, info text, and indicators (Location shared, Contacts alerted, Chain activated)

chain-config-card.visible: PASS - Chain Escape Sequence card visible
chain-config-card.step1_auto_fake_notification: PASS - Step 1 with chain-notif-toggle checkbox, chain-notif-delay input (seconds), chain-notif-title input
chain-config-card.step2_auto_fake_call: PASS - Step 2 with chain-call-toggle checkbox, chain-call-delay input (seconds), chain-call-name input

detection-config-card.visible: PASS - Voice Keywords & Settings card visible
detection-config-card.silent-mode-toggle: PASS - Silent Mode checkbox with 'no visible feedback' label
detection-config-card.voice-keywords: PASS - Voice Trigger Keywords section with removable badges (x button on each keyword)
detection-config-card.new-keyword-input: PASS - Add keyword input with Enter key support

frontend_ui.save-sos-config-btn: PASS - Save Config button visible and functional, triggers PUT /api/sos/config
frontend_ui.active-sos-banner: PASS - Red pulsing banner appears when SOS is active, shows trigger time, chain delays, Cancel SOS button
frontend_ui.cancel-active-sos-btn: PASS - Cancel SOS button in banner works, resolves SOS

sos-history-card.visible: PASS - Expandable SOS History section with count in header
sos-history-card.history_entries: PASS - Each entry shows trigger_type, status badge (active=red, resolved=green), timestamps, chain flags (Notif/Call indicators), location
sos-history-card.cancel_buttons: PASS - Active SOS entries have Cancel button

sse_handlers.sos_triggered: PASS - Handler registered in FamilyDashboard (lines 1500-1530), setActiveSOS called, toast.error displayed, chain setTimeout for notification and call
sse_handlers.sos_resolved: PASS - Handler registered in FamilyDashboard (lines 1532-1536), setActiveSOS updated, toast.success displayed
sse_handlers.chain_sequence: PASS - Auto-chain triggers: setFakeNotifData after notification delay, setFakeCallData after call delay

critical_code_review_comments: SOS config auto-creates with defaults on first GET (enabled=true, chain_notification=true, chain_call=true, silent_mode=true)
Chain delays configurable: notification_delay default 10s, call_delay default 40s
Trigger endpoint logs to sos_logs table and broadcasts sos_triggered SSE event
Cancel endpoint sets status=resolved with resolved_by and resolved_at, broadcasts sos_resolved SSE
History endpoint returns SOS logs sorted by triggered_at DESC
FamilyDashboard SSE handler for sos_triggered uses setTimeout to auto-chain: FakeNotification after delay → FakeCall after delay
SOS nav link uses RED (bg-red-600) instead of teal to indicate emergency nature
Active SOS banner shows pulsing red animation with chain countdown info
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. SOS config auto-created with defaults on first access. Test SOS events created during pytest and UI testing were cancelled/resolved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SOS Silent Mode fully tested. Backend: 5 endpoints under /api/sos prefix - config GET/PUT, trigger POST, cancel POST, history GET. Config auto-creates with defaults. Trigger returns chain info (notification + call delays). Cancel resolves SOS. SSE events: sos_triggered (triggers chain sequence), sos_resolved. Frontend: SOSPage at /family/sos shows big red trigger widget, chain config (Step 1: Auto Fake Notification, Step 2: Auto Fake Call), voice keywords section, settings toggles, expandable history. FamilyDashboard SSE handler auto-chains: FakeNotification after configured delay → FakeCall after configured delay. Navigation link 'SOS Silent Mode' in sidebar uses RED (bg-red-600) instead of teal to indicate emergency. Escape Call and Escape Notification features (Phases 46-47) verified still working.

verified_features.config_get: Working - Returns/auto-creates config with all fields
verified_features.config_put: Working - Updates all config fields (enabled, chain settings, voice keywords, silent mode, etc.)
verified_features.sos_trigger: Working - Creates active SOS, returns chain info, broadcasts SSE
verified_features.sos_cancel: Working - Resolves SOS, updates resolved_by/at, broadcasts SSE
verified_features.sos_history: Working - Returns sorted SOS logs with chain flags
verified_features.sos_trigger_widget: Working - Big red button triggers SOS
verified_features.active_sos_banner: Working - Pulsing banner with chain countdown, Cancel button
verified_features.chain_config: Working - Step 1 notification and Step 2 call configurable
verified_features.voice_keywords: Working - Removable badges with add keyword input
verified_features.settings_toggles: Working - SOS Enabled, Silent Mode, Auto-share location
verified_features.save_config: Working - Saves config via PUT endpoint
verified_features.sos_history_ui: Working - Expandable section with status badges, chain flags, timestamps
verified_features.sse_sos_triggered: Working - Handler triggers chain sequence with setTimeout
verified_features.sse_sos_resolved: Working - Handler updates UI and shows success toast
